ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner involved in the transaction */,
  "partner_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner category */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the transaction occurred */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type used for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money transacted */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was initiated */,
  "partner_pricing_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner pricing category */,
  "is_fraud" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is fraudulent (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for the transaction */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location (latitude and longitude) of the transaction */,
  "currency_amount" REAL /* Amount in the original currency */,
  "converted_amount" REAL /* Amount converted to a standard currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for conversion */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_version" INTEGER /* Version of the transaction record for tracking changes */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_partner_pricing_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_pricing_category_id") REFERENCES partner_pricing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_partner_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_category_id") REFERENCES partner_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the payment method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the partner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the partner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the partner */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the partner is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partner category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the partner category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the country is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the device type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_pricing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner pricing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner pricing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the partner pricing category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the partner pricing category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner pricing category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner pricing category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction flagged as fraudulent */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was flagged */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the transaction as fraudulent */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who reviewed the transaction */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was reviewed */,
  "is_confirmed_fraud" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is confirmed as fraudulent (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the fraud review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes added during the review process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fraud log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fraud log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction log */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the log */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
